description: Pixel-style sprites, retro fonts, CRT effects, neon colors, classic arcade UI patterns, and ready-to-use Space Invaders / shooter entity sprites.

crt-screen.description: CRT scanline effect on game screen
crt-screen.css: .game-screen { position:relative; background:#000; border:3px solid #333; border-radius:8px; box-shadow:0 0 30px rgba(0,255,65,0.15), inset 0 0 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.5); } .game-screen::after { content:''; position:absolute; inset:0; background:repeating-linear-gradient(0deg, transparent, transparent 2px, rgba(0,0,0,0.1) 2px, rgba(0,0,0,0.1) 4px); pointer-events:none; z-index:999; }

explosion.css: @keyframes explode { 0%{transform:scale(1);opacity:1;filter:brightness(1)} 20%{transform:scale(1.3);opacity:1;filter:brightness(2) hue-rotate(30deg)} 50%{transform:scale(1.5);opacity:0.7;filter:brightness(1.5)} 100%{transform:scale(2);opacity:0;filter:brightness(0.5)} } .exploding { animation:explode 0.4s ease-out forwards; pointer-events:none; }
explosion.usage: Add .exploding class on hit, remove element after 400ms

bullet.description: Laser bolt for player and enemy bullets
bullet.css: .bullet { width:3px; height:12px; background:#00ff41; box-shadow:0 0 4px #00ff41, 0 0 8px #00ff41; border-radius:1px; position:absolute; } .enemy-bullet { width:3px; height:12px; background:#ff0040; box-shadow:0 0 4px #ff0040; border-radius:1px; position:absolute; }

shield.description: Destructible shield barrier using CSS grid blocks
shield.css: .shield { display:inline-grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(22,3px); grid-template-rows:repeat(16,3px); gap:0; } .shield-block { width:3px; height:3px; background:#00ff41; transition:opacity 0.1s; } .shield-block.destroyed { background:transparent; }
shield.usage: Use createShield(container) JS helper to populate

sprite-renderer.description: Renders pixel sprites from grid arrays — use for ALL game entities
sprite-renderer.js: function renderSprite(grid,colors,scale){scale=scale||4;const h=grid.length,w=grid[0].length;let svg='<svg viewBox="0 0 '+(w*scale)+' '+(h*scale)+'" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">';for(let y=0;y<h;y++)for(let x=0;x<w;x++){const c=colors[grid[y][x]];if(c)svg+='<rect x="'+(x*scale)+'" y="'+(y*scale)+'" width="'+scale+'" height="'+scale+'" fill="'+c+'"/>';}return svg+'</svg>';}
sprite-renderer.usage: renderSprite(ALIEN_1, {1:'#ff0040'}, 4) for a red squid alien

space-invaders-sprites.description: Pre-built pixel-art sprite grids for Space Invaders entities (3 alien types + player + UFO)
space-invaders-sprites.usage: renderSprite(ALIEN_1, {1:'#ff0040'}, 4) for squid; renderSprite(ALIEN_2, {1:'#00d4ff'}, 4) for crab; renderSprite(ALIEN_3, {1:'#aa00ff'}, 3) for octopus; renderSprite(PLAYER_SHIP, {1:'#00ff41'}, 4) for player; renderSprite(UFO_SHIP, {1:'#ff6600'}, 3) for UFO

starfield.description: Scrolling starfield background for space games
starfield.usage: const updateBg = createStarfield(bgCanvas, 120); call updateBg() each frame

shield-builder.description: Creates and damages destructible shield barriers
shield-builder.js: function createShield(c){for(let y=0;y<16;y++)for(let x=0;x<22;x++){const inArch=y>10&&x>6&&x<15;const inBody=(y<3&&x>2&&x<19)||(y>=3&&y<=10)||(y>10&&!inArch);if(inBody){const b=document.createElement('div');b.className='shield-block';b.dataset.x=x;b.dataset.y=y;c.appendChild(b);}else{c.appendChild(document.createElement('div'));}}} function damageShield(c,hx,hy,r){c.querySelectorAll('.shield-block:not(.destroyed)').forEach(b=>{const bx=parseInt(b.dataset.x),by=parseInt(b.dataset.y);if(Math.abs(bx-hx)+Math.abs(by-hy)<=r)b.classList.add('destroyed');});}
shield-builder.usage: createShield(container) to build; damageShield(container, hitX, hitY, 3) on bullet collision
